commands.review_summary:
The PR sets non-interactive GitHub CLI color, TTY, and pager environment defaults in `scripts/pr` and adds a subprocess regression test that inspects the environment seen by `gh`.

PR surface: Tests +55, Other +8. Total +63 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection plus `gh help environment` gives a high-confidence path: inherit `GH_FORCE_TTY` or forced color settings into `scripts/pr` and the helper `gh --json` calls can receive terminal-style/colorized behavior unless the wrapper clears them.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] No repair lane is needed because the PR has no actionable review findings and mainly needs normal maintainer landing checks.

target.title: fix(ci): normalize GitHub CLI output
target.body:
## Summary

- Force machine-readable GitHub CLI output in `scripts/pr`, even when an operator shell inherits terminal color or forced-TTY settings.
- Add a subprocess regression test that verifies the environment seen by `gh`.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs test/scripts/pr-machine-output.test.ts`
- `bash -n scripts/pr`
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check scripts/pr test/scripts/pr-machine-output.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main`
target.author: vincentkoc
